title: strychnos chrysophylla
intro: Strychnos chrysophylla, a species of flowering plant in the family Loganiaceae, is a tree native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. Strychnos chrysophylla is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and bark are often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures for its medicinal purposes.
